entity.summary: Brazil-based centralized digital-asset exchange founded in 2013, providing real-denominated cryptocurrency markets and related investment services.
entity.notes: Official company history identifies 2013 as the start of Mercado Bitcoin. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Brazil-based exchange service.

expected.summary: Brazil-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Mercado Bitcoin brand.
